Correction: 11:30-13:00 is 90 minutes free, 14:00-15:30 is 90 minutes, so the longest is 90. Wait: 11:30-12:00 (30) + 12:00-13:00 (60) = 90, and 14:00-15:30 (90), so longest is 90. But if client call moves to 13:00-14:00, then 11:30-12:00 (30) + 12:00-13:00 (60) = 90, and 14:00-15:30 is now free (90), so longest is 90. Correction: 11:30-13:00 is 90 minutes free, and 14:00-15:30 is 90 minutes free, so longest is 90. But if client call is 13:00-14:00, then 11:30-12:00 (30) + 12:00-13:00 (60) = 90, and 14:00-15:30 (90), so longest is 90. However, 11:30-13:00 is 90, and 14:00-15:30 is 90, so longest is 90. But the original longest was 120 (13:00-15:30), now it's 90. So answer is 90.
